allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from backend.models.schemas import StudentProfile; print\('Schemas OK'\); from backend.rag.knowledge_base import KnowledgeBase; print\('KnowledgeBase OK'\); from backend.utils.llm_client import SparkLLMClient; print\('LLM Client OK'\); from backend.agents.base import BaseAgent; print\('BaseAgent OK'\); from backend.agents.profile import ProfileAgent; print\('ProfileAgent OK'\); from backend.agents.resources import DocAgent, QuizAgent, MindmapAgent, CodeAgent, ReadingAgent; print\('Resource Agents OK'\); from backend.agents.path_tutor_eval import PathAgent, TutorAgent, EvalAgent; print\('Path/Tutor/Eval Agents OK'\); from backend.agents.orchestrator import Orchestrator; print\('Orchestrator OK'\); from backend.main import app; print\('FastAPI app OK'\); print\('ALL IMPORTS VERIFIED!'\)")
